title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device location permission flow: user denies permission, then grants "While Using the App" via Enable Now prompt and returns to FMD screen
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app with a headset connected.
2. From the Home screen, tap the main menu (hamburger icon).
3. Tap "Find My Device" from the menu.
4. When the location permission prompt appears, tap "Don't Allow".
5. On the second prompt that appears, tap "Enable Now".
6. In the system settings, grant location permission with the "While Using the App" option.
7. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected:
1. The location permission prompt appears with three options: "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", and "Don't allow".
2. After tapping "Don't Allow", a second prompt appears with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" buttons, with the Find My Device screen visible in the background.
3. After tapping "Enable Now", the app navigates to system settings.
4. After granting "While Using the App" permission and returning to the app, the Find My Device screen is open and the permission window is no longer shown.
